content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across multiple sectors today — defense (HAL +1.5%, GRSE +9.2%), specialty chemicals (NAVINFLUOR +3.7%), FMCG (MARICO +4.84%), auto (M&M +5.68%), financials (ABCAPITAL +6.61%, CAMS +10.46%), capital goods (TITAGARH +9.84%). Global cues strong (Nasdaq +2.02%, S&P +1.46%). Existing book is overwhelmingly in-the-money post the rally; primary job this tick is to TRAIL SLs aggressively to lock gains rather than chase new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24200,
      "nifty_resistance": 24800
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Current SL 1035 already above entry (locks ~5% gain). SL 1035 sits ~2.0% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Q4 strong (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%), MACD bullish, price above all SMAs. Holding for target 1110. No-op on SL/target since current levels already optimal — emitting HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 121 (-3.5% from entry) intact. MACD bearish crossover, gold mildly correcting on Mid-East de-escalation. Defensive ETF — no urgency to exit, holding to see if INR weakness/Fed cycle reasserts."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Current SL 1735 already above entry (locks ~2% gain), sits ~1.3% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. ATH zone with Q4 strong but PROMOTER 2% STAKE SALE at ATH on May 5 is a distribution signal — keeping SL tight is correct. No change needed; effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4520.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Current SL at 4575 (entry/breakeven). Trailing SL up slightly to 4520 — wait, that's BELOW current SL of 4575 which would loosen. Correcting: keeping SL at 4575 (breakeven) since CMP only +1.2% — not yet at +2% trigger for trail. Defense theme strong (GRSE +9.2%, BEL orders), MACD bullish. No-op MODIFY — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior entry: CMP 4630 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%, below the +2% breakeven-trail trigger. Current SL 4575 (breakeven) is correct. Defense capex thesis intact, JM Financial expects 50% CAGR, target 4875 (Rs ~245 upside, R:R favorable). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Current SL 6960 already above entry (breakeven+). SL sits ~1.3% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. Q4 stellar (PAT +124% YoY, EBITDA margin +875bps), MACD bullish, sector momentum strong (SRF, SUMICHEM). Geojit TP 8500. Effectively no-op — HOLDing structure."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. Below +2% breakeven-trail trigger. SL 828 stays. Defense shipbuilding theme strong via Naval Systems subsidiary, JSW wagon order, but the +9.84% intraday move is parabolic — keeping wider SL to absorb chop. No change — HOLD logic."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.1%. SL 365 stays (-1.1% from entry). At fresh 52w high zone — strong Q4 (PAT +30% YoY, AUM +27%), MACD bullish. Below breakeven-trail trigger. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. SL 815 stays. Q4 strong (revenue +22%, PAT +14-18%), FMCG sector breakout, MOFSL TP 950. Below breakeven-trail trigger. Hammer pattern + MACD bullish supports thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. SL 1260 already at entry/breakeven, sits ~1.5% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT doubled, Encora consolidation from May 1, 10% UC today on results. Just under breakeven-trail trigger. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2970.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. Current SL 3000 (-0.8% from entry). Tightening SL slightly is risky given +9.2% intraday volatility. Keeping SL near entry — but the proposed 2970 would LOOSEN it from 3000. Correcting: leave SL at 3000 unchanged. Emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior MODIFY which would have loosened SL (rejected by guardrail anyway). CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%, SL 3000 (-0.8%) intact. Defense order pipeline strong (Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1, Rs 1.52 lakh cr DAC pipeline). HOLD to target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 806.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. Current SL 798 (-1.0%). Stock had +10.46% intraday move — major breakout. But P&L only +0.2% means we caught it late or earlier sell-off. Trail SL up to entry (806) to lock breakeven. New SL 806 sits ~0.2% below CMP — TOO TIGHT (violates 1% trail-gap floor). Reverting: keep SL at 798. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: tightening SL to 806 would put it only 0.2% below CMP, violating the 1% trail-gap floor (would self-stop on normal noise). Keeping SL at 798 (-1.2% below CMP, within tolerance). Q4 strong, Nuvama TP 910, MF AUM +21%. Hold to target 855."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "Below breakeven-trail trigger; SL at -0.8% adequate given +9.2% intraday vol."

      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening to 806 would breach 1% trail-gap floor. Keep at 798."

  "watchlist_notes": "M&M (auto sector leader, Q4 PAT +42% YoY, target 3800), HINDPETRO (OMC tailwind on crude relief), and BHARATFORG (defense+auto forging) remain attractive but: (a) book is already at full deployment (~80%+ given existing 11 holdings), (b) cluster discipline — already hold HAL/GRSE/TITAGARH in defense-cap-goods and ABCAPITAL/CAMS/PNBHOUSING in financials. Adding more = correlation stacking. NEULANDLAB has board meeting May 12 (binary in 3 sessions) — NO new entry per Rule 11. GABRIEL bearish research flag, BHARATFORG has board meeting TODAY (binary risk). HFCL pending order from prior day — that's stale; will address next tick.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Current book is already heavily deployed across 11 names with strong Q4 tailwinds. The right move today is DEFENSE OF GAINS via SL trailing on winners, not new entries. Cumulative P&L is -53.7% which is severe — capital preservation must dominate. Will not add new positions this tick. Cluster check: Defense/Cap-Goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH) ~22% of book. Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) ~24%. Both at cluster soft caps — NO new additions to either cluster. The HFCL OPEN MIS LIMIT order from a prior session needs cancellation in next cycle (stale, market has moved). Risk: many positions only +0.3% to +3% — one adverse session could clip multiple SLs simultaneously. Acceptable since SLs are tight and book is up unrealized."
}
